title: PaymentLine
description: An operational cost line in the property manager's ledger. Captured via CDC (Debezium → Kafka) whenever a row is inserted or updated in the payment_lines table.

event_id.description: Idempotency key. Used by Flink sinks to deduplicate on replay.

apartment_id.description: Surrogate key from the PMS database (UUID or integer as string).

apartment_reference.description: Human-readable property code used by the PM (e.g. BCN-042, MAD-007). Stable across renames.

concept.description: Standardised cost category. The pricing engine uses this to group costs by nature.

cost_type.description: Nature of the cost relative to the pricing calculation. Fixed costs are divided by available days. Variable costs scale with usage or bookings. One-time costs are amortised or excluded depending on config.

is_shared.description: True when this cost (e.g. office rent, channel manager fee) is shared across multiple apartments and has been pre-allocated before insertion.

allocation_ratio.description: Fraction of the original shared cost allocated to this apartment (e.g. 0.01 for 1 out of 100 apartments). Null when is_shared=false. The pricing engine uses the already-allocated amount_gross — this field is stored for audit only.

description.description: Free-text line as it appears on the invoice or bank statement (e.g. 'Endesa luz enero 2025 - Calle Gracia 42').

supplier_name.description: Supplier name, denormalised as a flat column so it survives CDC without nesting (see ADR-0003). Null when the cost line has no identifiable supplier (e.g. an internal allocation).

supplier_tax_id.description: CIF/NIF of the supplier for Spanish accounting. Flattened alongside supplier_name — see ADR-0003. Independently nullable: a tax_id without a name is invalid at the application layer but not rejected by this schema.

invoice_number.description: Supplier invoice number (número de factura). Null for direct debits without an invoice reference.

billing_period_start.description: Start of the service period this cost covers — NOT the payment date. A January electricity bill paid in February has billing_period_start 2025-01-01. Flattened from the original nested billing_period object — see ADR-0003.

billing_period_end.description: End of the service period this cost covers — NOT the payment date. See billing_period_start.

amount_gross.description: Total amount the PM pays, VAT included. Source of truth for the pricing engine.

amount_net.description: amount_gross / (1 + vat_rate). Stored for audit; the pricing engine uses amount_gross as it reflects actual cash outflow.

currency.description: Locked to EUR for this PoC. Extend to ISO 4217 pattern if multi-currency support is needed.

payment_date.description: Date the payment left the bank account. Null until status=paid.

source.description: How the record entered the PMS database.
